summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Human Resources professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building evidence-based policies and programs, and partnering cross-functionally to foster inclusive, high-performing workplaces. I increasingly use AI and thoughtful process design to strengthen HR operations—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Lead {coord|end-to-end program and project management} across 20+ concurrent initiatives, 10+ vendors, and multiple stakeholders—ensuring high-quality delivery on timelines
Redesign and standardize manual {ex|HR and operational processes} using {tools|AI tools} and {data|feedback analysis}, identifying inefficiencies and implementing scalable solutions
Build and maintain {prog|SOPs, guides, and a self-service knowledge base} for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Run needs assessments with 25+ {cross|stakeholders} and facilitate training for 600+ participants, driving a 78% program enrollment rate
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|analyze} 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs that drove {ex|policy redesign} recommendations
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps and recommend process and compliance improvements
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee experiences} to surface satisfaction drivers and guide C-suite decisions on engagement and performance priorities
Led a manager-effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed performance management strategies
Prepared and presented insights to senior leadership on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review best practices—supporting inclusive-workplace initiatives
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects spanning survey development, rewards & recognition, and learning & development
Assisted in {ex|employee relations cases}, ensuring compliance with local labor laws, company policy, and confidentiality standards across 3 global locations
Optimized {prog|onboarding} processes across 3 global locations via workflow analysis and clarifying responsibilities throughout the employee lifecycle
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 global locations—advancing an inclusive, high-performing workplace
Supported organizational change by helping coordinate a Mergers & Acquisitions project across {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Developed proficiency across core HR functions including recruitment, compensation benchmarking, and {prog|performance management}
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized outreach, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
